findings.evidence: `rg -n "conditionallyIIDWith_iff|@\[simp\]" code/TauCeti/Probability/Exchangeability/ConditionallyIID.lean` shows `conditionallyIIDWith_iff` at line 61 with no preceding `@[simp]`, while only `conditionallyIID_iff` is simp-tagged at line 79.
findings.fix: Add `@[simp]` to `conditionallyIIDWith_iff`, or provide an equivalent simp-normal characteristic lemma if this spelling is not the desired normal form.
findings.issue: `conditionallyIIDWith_iff` is the characteristic restatement for the non-`@[expose]` predicate `ConditionallyIIDWith`, but it is not tagged `@[simp]`.

summary: The named directing-measure predicate has the right basic constructors/destructors, but its hidden body is not registered as the simp normal form. Downstream users must name the characteristic theorem manually instead of letting automation expose the public predicate shape.
